skills.name: Debug Incident Triage
skills.shortDescription: Clusters incident signals into ranked, testable hypotheses.
skills.longDescription: Structures incident debugging by grouping recurring log signatures and producing prioritized next-step diagnostics for on-call teams.
skills.author: ARS SRE

inputs.name: incident_logs
inputs.description: Error and warning events collected during incident window.

outputs.name: triage_report
outputs.description: Ranked hypotheses with evidence and confidence.

outputs.name: next_checks
outputs.description: Ordered diagnostic checks with command-level specificity.

includedAssets.name: scripts/cluster_log_signatures.py
includedAssets.description: Groups recurring error signatures by normalized log message.

failureModes: Insufficient telemetry leads to incorrect hypotheses.
Clustered messages may merge distinct root causes.
Human triage quality varies under incident pressure.

examples.title: Checkout API timeout incident
examples.summary: Clusters timeout and DB connection errors into prioritized hypotheses.
examples.outputPreview: Top hypothesis: DB pool exhaustion after rollout

changelog.summary: Initial release for incident triage workflow.

skills.name: ETL Reconciliation Check
skills.shortDescription: Detects ETL drift using row-count and checksum reconciliation.
skills.longDescription: Compares source and target ETL summaries with deterministic checks to catch data-loss and transformation drift before release.
skills.author: ARS Data

inputs.name: source_summary
inputs.description: Source dataset counts, duplicates, and checksums.

inputs.name: target_summary
inputs.description: Target dataset counts, duplicates, and checksums.

outputs.name: reconciliation_report
outputs.description: Deterministic report of count and checksum mismatches.

includedAssets.name: scripts/reconcile_summaries.py
includedAssets.description: Compares source and target summary JSON metrics.

failureModes: Summary files exclude key business dimensions.
Tolerance configuration is too permissive.
Mismatch triage is delayed and blocks release timelines.

examples.title: Daily orders ETL reconciliation
examples.summary: Flags checksum mismatch despite matching row counts.
examples.outputPreview: FAIL with checksum discrepancy on order_total

changelog.summary: Initial release for deterministic ETL reconciliation.

skills.name: JSON Schema Enforcer
skills.shortDescription: Enforces strict JSON contracts for machine-consumed outputs.
skills.longDescription: Validates AI-generated JSON against explicit contracts with deterministic checks for required keys, type safety, allowed values, and forbidden fields.
skills.author: ARS Labs

inputs.name: contract_definition
inputs.description: Required fields, expected types, allowed values, and forbidden fields.

outputs.name: validated_output
outputs.description: JSON payload that passes all contract checks.

outputs.name: validation_report
outputs.description: Deterministic list of schema violations and fixes.

includedAssets.name: scripts/assert_contract.py
includedAssets.description: Validates JSON output against a lightweight contract spec.

includedAssets.name: references/contract-format.md
includedAssets.description: Defines the contract JSON format used by the validator.

idealUseCases: Automated compliance checks for JSON responses
failureModes: Semantically incorrect values can still pass if contract is incomplete.
Nested object constraints are limited in the lightweight checker.
Human review is still needed for business-rule correctness.

examples.title: Order status payload validation
examples.summary: Rejects unexpected enum values and missing required keys.

changelog.summary: Initial release with deterministic contract checks.

skills.name: Migration Rollback Safety
skills.shortDescription: Builds migration runbooks with explicit rollback criteria.
skills.longDescription: Defines preflight and rollback-safe migration execution with deterministic gating and ownership for production-impacting changes.
skills.author: ARS Ops

outputs.name: safe_runbook
outputs.description: Preflight checks, staged execution, and rollback procedure.

includedAssets.name: scripts/check_migration_plan.py
includedAssets.description: Checks that migration plans include preflight and rollback sections.

failureModes: Undocumented side effects invalidate rollback assumptions.
No rollback rehearsal in staging.
Operational ownership gaps during rollback execution.

examples.title: Orders table phased migration
examples.summary: Two-phase rollout with shadow writes and rollback guardrails.
examples.outputPreview: Runbook with abort thresholds and owner matrix

changelog.summary: Initial release for rollback-safe migration planning.

skills.name: PR Change Risk Review
skills.shortDescription: Scores pull request risk and enforces mitigation checkpoints.
skills.longDescription: Provides deterministic risk scoring from diff metadata, then links high-risk changes to explicit mitigation and approval requirements.
skills.author: ARS Labs

inputs.name: diff_stats
inputs.description: PR change metrics and touched file inventory.

outputs.name: risk_report
outputs.description: Severity score with evidence and rationale.

outputs.name: mitigation_checklist
outputs.description: Required safeguards before merge or deploy.

includedAssets.name: scripts/score_risk.py
includedAssets.description: Computes deterministic risk score from diff metrics.

failureModes: Heuristic scoring may miss nuanced business risk.
Teams may override scores without strong evidence.
Diff statistics can underrepresent runtime behavior changes.

examples.title: Payment data-layer refactor
examples.summary: Escalates to high risk due to critical paths and high churn.

changelog.summary: Initial release for PR change-risk scoring workflow.

skills.name: Repo Workflow Bootstrap
skills.shortDescription: Standardizes local and CI command contracts for repositories.
skills.longDescription: Introduces deterministic build/test workflow baselines and validates required files for maintainable engineering operations.
skills.author: ARS Platform

inputs.name: repo_layout
inputs.description: Current repository tooling and command surface.

inputs.name: required_checks
inputs.description: Quality gate expectations for merge readiness.

outputs.name: workflow_plan
outputs.description: Canonical command contract and CI flow.

outputs.name: bootstrap_patch
outputs.description: Patch to add scripts/config for workflow baseline.

includedAssets.name: scripts/verify_pipeline_files.py
includedAssets.description: Checks for expected CI and command contract files.

failureModes: Bootstrap plan misses language-specific build requirements.
CI checks diverge from local scripts over time.
Required files exist but do not enforce correct behavior.

examples.title: Legacy service CI baseline
examples.summary: Introduces canonical lint/test/build workflow and verification checks.
examples.outputPreview: Workflow plan and required file checklist

changelog.summary: Initial release for repository workflow bootstrap.

skills.name: Secure Endpoint Review
skills.shortDescription: Applies secure-default checks to API endpoints before merge.
skills.longDescription: Combines static checks and manual review to enforce auth, validation, and data-handling controls in endpoint implementations.
skills.author: ARS Security

inputs.name: endpoint_code
inputs.description: Handler and middleware code for reviewed endpoint.

inputs.name: auth_policy
inputs.description: Role and permission requirements for endpoint access.

includedAssets.name: scripts/scan_fastapi_route.py
includedAssets.description: Performs basic static scans for missing auth and weak validation.

failureModes: Context-specific abuse cases are missed by static checks.
Policy ambiguity leads to inconsistent authorization controls.
Fixes may break backward compatibility if not staged carefully.

examples.title: Invoice endpoint auth hardening
examples.summary: Detected missing role check and unsafe error detail leakage.

changelog.summary: Initial release for endpoint security review workflow.

skills.name: Test-First Change Guardrail
skills.shortDescription: Forces failing-test-first delivery for reliable code changes.
skills.longDescription: Encodes a deterministic red-green workflow for behavior-changing code updates and requires regression evidence before merge.
skills.author: ARS Labs

inputs.name: change_request
inputs.description: Bug report or feature acceptance criteria.

outputs.name: failing_test_patch
outputs.description: Test updates that fail before implementation.

outputs.name: verification_log
outputs.description: Execution evidence that updated and regression tests pass.

failureModes: Tests created after implementation hide root cause.
Regression suite misses neighboring modules.
Plans skip explicit baseline behavior capture.

examples.title: Tax rounding bug fix
examples.summary: Captures off-by-one cent failure before changing calculator logic.
examples.outputPreview: Passing focused tests + full regression log

changelog.summary: Initial release for deterministic test-first workflows.
